creator: el.goretto@free.fr
text:
Hello,

0.2.16 version of umurmur can't correctly present a TLS certificates chain (involving an intermediate CA certificate) to its clients: all mumble clients report invalid certificate in that case (https://github.com/umurmur/umurmur/issues/64)
0.2.17 contains the upstream fix for this (https://github.com/umurmur/umurmur/issues/108) and is available since April 2017.

Is it possible to initiate the version bump process, Ladies & Gentemen? :)

Thank you.
